commit.message:
8386332

Hi all,

  please review this bugfix that removes the `MemoryPoolMXBean.getCollectionUsage()` update from Cleanup pauses.

They should only be sent if the garbage collector "expended work to reclaim memory in the respective pool" - the Cleanup pause doesn't attempt to reclaim memory in the Cleanup pause at all.

Testing: gha, new test

Thanks,
  Thomas
